title: vicia lutea var. laevigata
intro: Vicia lutea var. laevigata, also known as the smooth yellow vetch or smooth bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Vicia lutea var. laevigata include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
